summary: CryptoVault testing completed - Backend and admin flows working excellently, user session persistence issue identified

integration_issues.issue: User login successful but session not persisting for protected routes like /markets and /earn - redirects back to auth page

passed_tests: Crypto data API (19 cryptocurrencies with BTC found)
User signup flow (auto-verified in dev mode)
User login API (successful with access_token and cookies)
Admin OTP auto-fill in dev mode (OTP: 644305)
Homepage load (price ticker found, navigation works)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix user session persistence issue - user login works via API but sessions don't persist for frontend protected routes, causing redirects back to auth page when accessing /dashboard, /markets, /earn. Admin sessions work perfectly. Check frontend authentication context or cookie handling.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed), Frontend: 75% (admin flows work, user session persistence fails)
